nasb.text: Now behold, as your life was highly valued in my sight this day, so may my life be highly valued in the sight of the Lord, and may He deliver me from all distress.”

esv.text: Behold, as your life was precious this day in my sight, so may my life be precious in the sight of the Lord, and may he deliver me out of all tribulation.”

cnv.text: 看哪，我今天怎樣看重你的命，願耶和華也怎樣看重我的命，並且救我脫離一切患難。”

ccb.text: 我今天保存了你的性命，愿耶和华也保存我的性命，救我脱离一切患难。”
